rows.label: tlk000029_msg0001
rows.name:
Items sold to the Central
Exchange by salvagers are put
up for auction like this.

rows.label: tlk000029_msg0002
rows.name:
You often see real gems, but there's
a rumor the Commerce Guild Chairman
gets first dibs on true valuables.

rows.label: tlk000029_msg0003
rows.name:
But I can't imagine such a
wonderful person would ever
do something like that.
